english: Say, "He is the Most Merciful; we have believed in Him, and upon Him we have relied. And you will [come to] know who it is that is in clear error."

name: Al-Qalam
arabic: مَآ أَنتَ بِنِعْمَةِ رَبِّكَ بِمَجْنُونٍ
english: You are not, [O Muhammad], by the favor of your Lord, a madman.

name: Al-Qalam
arabic: بِأَييِّكُمُ ٱلْمَفْتُونُ
english: Which of you is the afflicted [by a devil].

name: Al-Qalam
arabic: إِنَّ رَبَّكَ هُوَ أَعْلَمُ بِمَن ضَلَّ عَن سَبِيلِهِۦ وَهُوَ أَعْلَمُ بِٱلْمُهْتَدِينَ
english: Indeed, your Lord is most knowing of who has gone astray from His way, and He is most knowing of the [rightly] guided.

name: Al-Qalam
arabic: فَطَافَ عَلَيْهَا طَآئِفٌ مِّن رَّبِّكَ وَهُمْ نَآئِمُونَ
english: So there came upon the garden an affliction from your Lord while they were asleep.

name: Al-Qalam
arabic: أَن لَّا يَدْخُلَنَّهَا ٱلْيَوْمَ عَلَيْكُم مِّسْكِينٌ
english: [Saying], "There will surely not enter it today upon you [any] poor person."

name: Al-Qalam
arabic: قَالَ أَوْسَطُهُمْ أَلَمْ أَقُل لَّكُمْ لَوْلَا تُسَبِّحُونَ
english: The most moderate of them said, "Did I not say to you, \'Why do you not exalt [Allah]?\' "

name: Al-Qalam
arabic: قَالُوا۟ سُبْحَـٰنَ رَبِّنَآ إِنَّا كُنَّا ظَـٰلِمِينَ
english: They said, "Exalted is our Lord! Indeed, we were wrongdoers."

name: Al-Qalam
arabic: إِنَّ لِلْمُتَّقِينَ عِندَ رَبِّهِمْ جَنَّـٰتِ ٱلنَّعِيمِ
english: Indeed, for the righteous with their Lord are the Gardens of Pleasure.

name: Al-Qalam
arabic: أَمْ لَهُمْ شُرَكَآءُ فَلْيَأْتُوا۟ بِشُرَكَآئِهِمْ إِن كَانُوا۟ صَـٰدِقِينَ
english: Or do they have partners? Then let them bring their partners, if they should be truthful.

name: Al-Qalam
arabic: يَوْمَ يُكْشَفُ عَن سَاقٍ وَيُدْعَوْنَ إِلَى ٱلسُّجُودِ فَلَا يَسْتَطِيعُونَ
english: The Day the shin will be uncovered and they are invited to prostration but the disbelievers will not be able,

name: Al-Qalam
arabic: فَٱصْبِرْ لِحُكْمِ رَبِّكَ وَلَا تَكُن كَصَاحِبِ ٱلْحُوتِ إِذْ نَادَىٰ وَهُوَ مَكْظُومٌ
english: Then be patient for the decision of your Lord, [O Muhammad], and be not like the companion of the fish when he called out while he was distressed.

name: Al-Qalam
arabic: لَّوْلَآ أَن تَدَٰرَكَهُۥ نِعْمَةٌ مِّن رَّبِّهِۦ لَنُبِذَ بِٱلْعَرَآءِ وَهُوَ مَذْمُومٌ
english: If not that a favor from his Lord overtook him, he would have been thrown onto the naked shore while he was censured.

name: Al-Qalam
arabic: فَٱجْتَبَـٰهُ رَبُّهُۥ فَجَعَلَهُۥ مِنَ ٱلصَّـٰلِحِينَ
english: And his Lord chose him and made him of the righteous.

name: Al-Qalam
arabic: وَإِن يَكَادُ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ لَيُزْلِقُونَكَ بِأَبْصَـٰرِهِمْ لَمَّا سَمِعُوا۟ ٱلذِّكْرَ وَيَقُولُونَ إِنَّهُۥ لَمَجْنُونٌ
english: And indeed, those who disbelieve would almost make you slip with their eyes when they hear the message, and they say, "Indeed, he is mad."

name: Al-Qalam
arabic: وَمَا هُوَ إِلَّا ذِكْرٌ لِّلْعَـٰلَمِينَ
english: But it is not except a reminder to the worlds.

name: Al-Haqqah
arabic: سَخَّرَهَا عَلَيْهِمْ سَبْعَ لَيَالٍ وَثَمَـٰنِيَةَ أَيَّامٍ حُسُومًا فَتَرَى ٱلْقَوْمَ فِيهَا صَرْعَىٰ كَأَنَّهُمْ أَعْجَازُ نَخْلٍ خَاوِيَةٍ
english: Which Allah imposed upon them for seven nights and eight days in succession, so you would see the people therein fallen as if they were hollow trunks of palm trees.

name: Al-Haqqah
arabic: فَعَصَوْا۟ رَسُولَ رَبِّهِمْ فَأَخَذَهُمْ أَخْذَةً رَّابِيَةً
english: And they disobeyed the messenger of their Lord, so He seized them with a seizure exceeding [in severity].

name: Al-Haqqah
arabic: لِنَجْعَلَهَا لَكُمْ تَذْكِرَةً وَتَعِيَهَآ أُذُنٌ وَٰعِيَةٌ
english: That We might make it for you a reminder and [that] a conscious ear would be conscious of it.

name: Al-Haqqah
arabic: وَٱلْمَلَكُ عَلَىٰٓ أَرْجَآئِهَا ۚ وَيَحْمِلُ عَرْشَ رَبِّكَ فَوْقَهُمْ يَوْمَئِذٍ ثَمَـٰنِيَةٌ
english: And the angels are at its edges. And there will bear the Throne of your Lord above them, that Day, eight [of them].

name: Al-Haqqah
arabic: خُذُوهُ فَغُلُّوهُ
english: [Allah will say], "Seize him and shackle him.

name: Al-Haqqah
arabic: ثُمَّ ٱلْجَحِيمَ صَلُّوهُ
english: Then into Hellfire drive him.

name: Al-Haqqah
arabic: إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ لَا يُؤْمِنُ بِٱللَّهِ ٱلْعَظِيمِ
english: Indeed, he did not used to believe in Allah, the Most Great,

name: Al-Haqqah
arabic: وَلَا يَحُضُّ عَلَىٰ طَعَامِ ٱلْمِسْكِينِ
english: Nor did he encourage the feeding of the poor.

name: Al-Haqqah
arabic: وَمَا هُوَ بِقَوْلِ شَاعِرٍ ۚ قَلِيلًا مَّا تُؤْمِنُونَ
english: And it is not the word of a poet; little do you believe.

name: Al-Haqqah
arabic: تَنزِيلٌ مِّن رَّبِّ ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ
english: [It is] a revelation from the Lord of the worlds.

name: Al-Haqqah
arabic: وَإِنَّهُۥ لَتَذْكِرَةٌ لِّلْمُتَّقِينَ
english: And indeed, the Qur\'an is a reminder for the righteous.

name: Al-Haqqah
arabic: وَإِنَّهُۥ لَحَسْرَةٌ عَلَى ٱلْكَـٰفِرِينَ
english: And indeed, it will be [a cause of] regret upon the disbelievers.

name: Al-Haqqah
arabic: وَإِنَّهُۥ لَحَقُّ ٱلْيَقِينِ
english: And indeed, it is the truth of certainty.

name: Al-Haqqah
arabic: فَسَبِّحْ بِٱسْمِ رَبِّكَ ٱلْعَظِيمِ
english: So exalt the name of your Lord, the Most Great.

name: Al-Ma'arij
arabic: لِّلْكَـٰفِرِينَ لَيْسَ لَهُۥ دَافِعٌ
english: To the disbelievers; of it there is no preventer.

name: Al-Ma'arij
arabic: مِّنَ ٱللَّهِ ذِى ٱلْمَعَارِجِ
english: [It is] from Allah, owner of the ways of ascent.

name: Al-Ma'arij
arabic: فَٱصْبِرْ صَبْرًا جَمِيلًا
english: So be patient with gracious patience.

name: Al-Ma'arij
arabic: كَلَّآ ۖ إِنَّهَا لَظَىٰ
english: No! Indeed, it is the Flame [of Hell],

name: Al-Ma'arij
arabic: تَدْعُوا۟ مَنْ أَدْبَرَ وَتَوَلَّىٰ
english: It invites he who turned his back [on truth] and went away [from obedience]

name: Al-Ma'arij
arabic: إِذَا مَسَّهُ ٱلشَّرُّ جَزُوعًا
english: When evil touches him, impatient,

name: Al-Ma'arij
arabic: إِلَّا ٱلْمُصَلِّينَ
english: Except the observers of prayer -

name: Al-Ma'arij
arabic: ٱلَّذِينَ هُمْ عَلَىٰ صَلَاتِهِمْ دَآئِمُونَ
english: Those who are constant in their prayer

name: Al-Ma'arij
arabic: وَٱلَّذِينَ يُصَدِّقُونَ بِيَوْمِ ٱلدِّينِ
english: And those who believe in the Day of Recompense

name: Al-Ma'arij
arabic: وَٱلَّذِينَ هُم مِّنْ عَذَابِ رَبِّهِم مُّشْفِقُونَ
english: And those who are fearful of the punishment of their Lord -

name: Al-Ma'arij
arabic: إِنَّ عَذَابَ رَبِّهِمْ غَيْرُ مَأْمُونٍ
english: Indeed, the punishment of their Lord is not that from which one is safe -

name: Al-Ma'arij
arabic: وَٱلَّذِينَ هُمْ عَلَىٰ صَلَاتِهِمْ يُحَافِظُونَ
english: And those who [carefully] maintain their prayer:

name: Al-Ma'arij
arabic: فَمَالِ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ قِبَلَكَ مُهْطِعِينَ
english: So what is [the matter] with those who disbelieve, hastening [from] before you, [O Muhammad],

name: Al-Ma'arij
arabic: فَلَآ أُقْسِمُ بِرَبِّ ٱلْمَشَـٰرِقِ وَٱلْمَغَـٰرِبِ إِنَّا لَقَـٰدِرُونَ
english: So I swear by the Lord of [all] risings and settings that indeed We are able

name: Nuh
arabic: أَنِ ٱعْبُدُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ وَٱتَّقُوهُ وَأَطِيعُونِ
english: [Saying], \'Worship Allah, fear Him and obey me.

name: Nuh
arabic: يَغْفِرْ لَكُم مِّن ذُنُوبِكُمْ وَيُؤَخِّرْكُمْ إِلَىٰٓ أَجَلٍ مُّسَمًّى ۚ إِنَّ أَجَلَ ٱللَّهِ إِذَا جَآءَ لَا يُؤَخَّرُ ۖ لَوْ كُنتُمْ تَعْلَمُونَ
english: Allah will forgive you of your sins and delay you for a specified term. Indeed, the time [set by] Allah, when it comes, will not be delayed, if you only knew.\' "

name: Nuh
arabic: قَالَ رَبِّ إِنِّى دَعَوْتُ قَوْمِى لَيْلًا وَنَهَارًا
english: He said, "My Lord, indeed I invited my people [to truth] night and day.

name: Nuh
arabic: وَإِنِّى كُلَّمَا دَعَوْتُهُمْ لِتَغْفِرَ لَهُمْ جَعَلُوٓا۟ أَصَـٰبِعَهُمْ فِىٓ ءَاذَانِهِمْ وَٱسْتَغْشَوْا۟ ثِيَابَهُمْ وَأَصَرُّوا۟ وَٱسْتَكْبَرُوا۟ ٱسْتِكْبَارًا
english: And indeed, every time I invited them that You may forgive them, they put their fingers in their ears, covered themselves with their garments, persisted, and were arrogant with [great] arrogance.

name: Nuh
arabic: فَقُلْتُ ٱسْتَغْفِرُوا۟ رَبَّكُمْ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ غَفَّارًا
english: And said, \'Ask forgiveness of your Lord. Indeed, He is ever a Perpetual Forgiver.

name: Nuh
arabic: مَّا لَكُمْ لَا تَرْجُونَ لِلَّهِ وَقَارًا
english: What is [the matter] with you that you do not attribute to Allah [due] grandeur

name: Nuh
arabic: أَلَمْ تَرَوْا۟ كَيْفَ خَلَقَ ٱللَّهُ سَبْعَ سَمَـٰوَٰتٍ طِبَاقًا
english: Do you not consider how Allah has created seven heavens in layers

name: Nuh
arabic: وَٱللَّهُ أَنۢبَتَكُم مِّنَ ٱلْأَرْضِ نَبَاتًا
english: And Allah has caused you to grow from the earth a [progressive] growth.

name: Nuh
arabic: وَٱللَّهُ جَعَلَ لَكُمُ ٱلْأَرْضَ بِسَاطًا
english: And Allah has made for you the earth an expanse

name: Nuh
arabic: وَقَدْ أَضَلُّوا۟ كَثِيرًا ۖ وَلَا تَزِدِ ٱلظَّـٰلِمِينَ إِلَّا ضَلَـٰلًا
english: And already they have misled many. And, [my Lord], do not increase the wrongdoers except in error."

name: Nuh
arabic: مِّمَّا خَطِيٓـَٔـٰتِهِمْ أُغْرِقُوا۟ فَأُدْخِلُوا۟ نَارًا فَلَمْ يَجِدُوا۟ لَهُم مِّن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ أَنصَارًا
english: Because of their sins they were drowned and put into the Fire, and they found not for themselves besides Allah [any] helpers.

name: Nuh
arabic: إِنَّكَ إِن تَذَرْهُمْ يُضِلُّوا۟ عِبَادَكَ وَلَا يَلِدُوٓا۟ إِلَّا فَاجِرًا كَفَّارًا
english: Indeed, if You leave them, they will mislead Your servants and not beget except [every] wicked one and [confirmed] disbeliever.

name: Al-Jinn
arabic: يَهْدِىٓ إِلَى ٱلرُّشْدِ فَـَٔامَنَّا بِهِۦ ۖ وَلَن نُّشْرِكَ بِرَبِّنَآ أَحَدًا
english: It guides to the right course, and we have believed in it. And we will never associate with our Lord anyone.

name: Al-Jinn
arabic: وَأَنَّهُۥ تَعَـٰلَىٰ جَدُّ رَبِّنَا مَا ٱتَّخَذَ صَـٰحِبَةً وَلَا وَلَدًا
english: And [it teaches] that exalted is the nobleness of our Lord; He has not taken a wife or a son

name: Al-Jinn
arabic: وَأَنَّهُۥ كَانَ يَقُولُ سَفِيهُنَا عَلَى ٱللَّهِ شَطَطًا
english: And that our foolish one has been saying about Allah an excessive transgression.

name: Al-Jinn
arabic: وَأَنَّا ظَنَنَّآ أَن لَّن تَقُولَ ٱلْإِنسُ وَٱلْجِنُّ عَلَى ٱللَّهِ كَذِبًا
english: And we had thought that mankind and the jinn would never speak about Allah a lie.

name: Al-Jinn
arabic: وَأَنَّهُمْ ظَنُّوا۟ كَمَا ظَنَنتُمْ أَن لَّن يَبْعَثَ ٱللَّهُ أَحَدًا
english: And they had thought, as you thought, that Allah would never send anyone [as a messenger].

name: Al-Jinn
arabic: وَأَنَّا لَا نَدْرِىٓ أَشَرٌّ أُرِيدَ بِمَن فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ أَمْ أَرَادَ بِهِمْ رَبُّهُمْ رَشَدًا
english: And we do not know [therefore] whether evil is intended for those on earth or whether their Lord intends for them a right course.

name: Al-Jinn
arabic: وَأَنَّا ظَنَنَّآ أَن لَّن نُّعْجِزَ ٱللَّهَ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ وَلَن نُّعْجِزَهُۥ هَرَبًا
english: And we have become certain that we will never cause failure to Allah upon earth, nor can we escape Him by flight.

name: Al-Jinn
arabic: وَأَنَّا لَمَّا سَمِعْنَا ٱلْهُدَىٰٓ ءَامَنَّا بِهِۦ ۖ فَمَن يُؤْمِنۢ بِرَبِّهِۦ فَلَا يَخَافُ بَخْسًا وَلَا رَهَقًا
english: And when we heard the guidance, we believed in it. And whoever believes in his Lord will not fear deprivation or burden.

name: Al-Jinn
arabic: وَأَنَّا مِنَّا ٱلْمُسْلِمُونَ وَمِنَّا ٱلْقَـٰسِطُونَ ۖ فَمَنْ أَسْلَمَ فَأُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ تَحَرَّوْا۟ رَشَدًا
english: And among us are Muslims [in submission to Allah], and among us are the unjust. And whoever has become Muslim - those have sought out the right course.

name: Al-Jinn
arabic: وَأَمَّا ٱلْقَـٰسِطُونَ فَكَانُوا۟ لِجَهَنَّمَ حَطَبًا
english: But as for the unjust, they will be, for Hell, firewood.\'

name: Al-Jinn
arabic: وَأَلَّوِ ٱسْتَقَـٰمُوا۟ عَلَى ٱلطَّرِيقَةِ لَأَسْقَيْنَـٰهُم مَّآءً غَدَقًا
english: And [Allah revealed] that if they had remained straight on the way, We would have given them abundant provision

name: Al-Jinn
arabic: لِّنَفْتِنَهُمْ فِيهِ ۚ وَمَن يُعْرِضْ عَن ذِكْرِ رَبِّهِۦ يَسْلُكْهُ عَذَابًا صَعَدًا
english: So We might test them therein. And whoever turns away from the remembrance of his Lord He will put into arduous punishment.

name: Al-Jinn
arabic: وَأَنَّ ٱلْمَسَـٰجِدَ لِلَّهِ فَلَا تَدْعُوا۟ مَعَ ٱللَّهِ أَحَدًا
english: And [He revealed] that the masjids are for Allah, so do not invoke with Allah anyone.

name: Al-Jinn
arabic: وَأَنَّهُۥ لَمَّا قَامَ عَبْدُ ٱللَّهِ يَدْعُوهُ كَادُوا۟ يَكُونُونَ عَلَيْهِ لِبَدًا
english: And that when the Servant of Allah stood up supplicating Him, they almost became about him a compacted mass."

name: Al-Jinn
arabic: قُلْ إِنَّمَآ أَدْعُوا۟ رَبِّى وَلَآ أُشْرِكُ بِهِۦٓ أَحَدًا
english: Say, [O Muhammad], "I only invoke my Lord and do not associate with Him anyone."

name: Al-Jinn
arabic: قُلْ إِنِّى لَن يُجِيرَنِى مِنَ ٱللَّهِ أَحَدٌ وَلَنْ أَجِدَ مِن دُونِهِۦ مُلْتَحَدًا
english: Say, "Indeed, there will never protect me from Allah anyone [if I should disobey], nor will I find in other than Him a refuge.

name: Al-Jinn
arabic: إِلَّا بَلَـٰغًا مِّنَ ٱللَّهِ وَرِسَـٰلَـٰتِهِۦ ۚ وَمَن يَعْصِ ٱللَّهَ وَرَسُولَهُۥ فَإِنَّ لَهُۥ نَارَ جَهَنَّمَ خَـٰلِدِينَ فِيهَآ أَبَدًا
english: But [I have for you] only notification from Allah, and His messages." And whoever disobeys Allah and His Messenger - then indeed, for him is the fire of Hell; they will abide therein forever.

name: Al-Jinn
arabic: حَتَّىٰٓ إِذَا رَأَوْا۟ مَا يُوعَدُونَ فَسَيَعْلَمُونَ مَنْ أَضْعَفُ نَاصِرًا وَأَقَلُّ عَدَدًا
english: [The disbelievers continue] until, when they see that which they are promised, then they will know who is weaker in helpers and less in number.

name: Al-Jinn
arabic: قُلْ إِنْ أَدْرِىٓ أَقَرِيبٌ مَّا تُوعَدُونَ أَمْ يَجْعَلُ لَهُۥ رَبِّىٓ أَمَدًا
english: Say, "I do not know if what you are promised is near or if my Lord will grant for it a [long] period."

name: Al-Jinn
arabic: عَـٰلِمُ ٱلْغَيْبِ فَلَا يُظْهِرُ عَلَىٰ غَيْبِهِۦٓ أَحَدًا
english: [He is] Knower of the unseen, and He does not disclose His [knowledge of the] unseen to anyone

name: Al-Jinn
arabic: لِّيَعْلَمَ أَن قَدْ أَبْلَغُوا۟ رِسَـٰلَـٰتِ رَبِّهِمْ وَأَحَاطَ بِمَا لَدَيْهِمْ وَأَحْصَىٰ كُلَّ شَىْءٍ عَدَدًۢا
english: That he may know that they have conveyed the messages of their Lord; and He has encompassed whatever is with them and has enumerated all things in number.

name: Al-Muzzammil
arabic: إِنَّ نَاشِئَةَ ٱلَّيْلِ هِىَ أَشَدُّ وَطْـًٔا وَأَقْوَمُ قِيلًا
english: Indeed, the hours of the night are more effective for concurrence [of heart and tongue] and more suitable for words.

name: Al-Muzzammil
arabic: وَٱذْكُرِ ٱسْمَ رَبِّكَ وَتَبَتَّلْ إِلَيْهِ تَبْتِيلًا
english: And remember the name of your Lord and devote yourself to Him with [complete] devotion.

name: Al-Muzzammil
arabic: رَّبُّ ٱلْمَشْرِقِ وَٱلْمَغْرِبِ لَآ إِلَـٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ فَٱتَّخِذْهُ وَكِيلًا
english: [He is] the Lord of the East and the West; there is no deity except Him, so take Him as Disposer of [your] affairs.

name: Al-Muzzammil
arabic: إِنَّ لَدَيْنَآ أَنكَالًا وَجَحِيمًا
english: Indeed, with Us [for them] are shackles and burning fire

name: Al-Muzzammil
arabic: فَكَيْفَ تَتَّقُونَ إِن كَفَرْتُمْ يَوْمًا يَجْعَلُ ٱلْوِلْدَٰنَ شِيبًا
english: Then how can you fear, if you disbelieve, a Day that will make the children white- haired?

name: Al-Muzzammil
arabic: إِنَّ هَـٰذِهِۦ تَذْكِرَةٌ ۖ فَمَن شَآءَ ٱتَّخَذَ إِلَىٰ رَبِّهِۦ سَبِيلًا
english: Indeed, this is a reminder, so whoever wills may take to his Lord a way.

name: Al-Muddaththir
arabic: وَرَبَّكَ فَكَبِّرْ
english: And your Lord glorify

name: Al-Muddaththir
arabic: وَلِرَبِّكَ فَٱصْبِرْ
english: But for your Lord be patient.

name: Al-Muddaththir
arabic: عَلَى ٱلْكَـٰفِرِينَ غَيْرُ يَسِيرٍ
english: For the disbelievers - not easy.

name: Al-Muddaththir
arabic: وَمَا جَعَلْنَآ أَصْحَـٰبَ ٱلنَّارِ إِلَّا مَلَـٰٓئِكَةً ۙ وَمَا جَعَلْنَا عِدَّتَهُمْ إِلَّا فِتْنَةً لِّلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ لِيَسْتَيْقِنَ ٱلَّذِينَ أُوتُوا۟ ٱلْكِتَـٰبَ وَيَزْدَادَ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوٓا۟ إِيمَـٰنًا ۙ وَلَا يَرْتَابَ ٱلَّذِينَ أُوتُوا۟ ٱلْكِتَـٰبَ وَٱلْمُؤْمِنُونَ ۙ وَلِيَقُولَ ٱلَّذِينَ فِى قُلُوبِهِم مَّرَضٌ وَٱلْكَـٰفِرُونَ مَاذَآ أَرَادَ ٱللَّهُ بِهَـٰذَا مَثَلًا ۚ كَذَٰلِكَ يُضِلُّ ٱللَّهُ مَن يَشَآءُ وَيَهْدِى مَن يَشَآءُ ۚ وَمَا يَعْلَمُ جُنُودَ رَبِّكَ إِلَّا هُوَ ۚ وَمَا هِىَ إِلَّا ذِكْرَىٰ لِلْبَشَرِ
english: And We have not made the keepers of the Fire except angels. And We have not made their number except as a trial for those who disbelieve - that those who were given the Scripture will be convinced and those who have believed will increase in faith and those who were given the Scripture and the believers will not doubt and that those in whose hearts is hypocrisy and the disbelievers will say, "What does Allah intend by this as an example?" Thus does Allah leave astray whom He wills and guides whom He wills. And none knows the soldiers of your Lord except Him. And mention of the Fire is not but a reminder to humanity.

name: Al-Muddaththir
arabic: إِنَّهَا لَإِحْدَى ٱلْكُبَرِ
english: Indeed, the Fire is of the greatest [afflictions]

name: Al-Muddaththir
arabic: وَلَمْ نَكُ نُطْعِمُ ٱلْمِسْكِينَ
english: Nor did we used to feed the poor.

name: Al-Muddaththir
arabic: فَمَا لَهُمْ عَنِ ٱلتَّذْكِرَةِ مُعْرِضِينَ
english: Then what is [the matter] with them that they are, from the reminder, turning away

name: Al-Muddaththir
arabic: كَلَّآ إِنَّهُۥ تَذْكِرَةٌ
english: No! Indeed, the Qur\'an is a reminder

name: Al-Muddaththir
arabic: وَمَا يَذْكُرُونَ إِلَّآ أَن يَشَآءَ ٱللَّهُ ۚ هُوَ أَهْلُ ٱلتَّقْوَىٰ وَأَهْلُ ٱلْمَغْفِرَةِ
english: And they will not remember except that Allah wills. He is worthy of fear and adequate for [granting] forgiveness.

name: Al-Qiyamah
arabic: وَلَآ أُقْسِمُ بِٱلنَّفْسِ ٱللَّوَّامَةِ
english: And I swear by the reproaching soul [to the certainty of resurrection].

name: Al-Qiyamah
arabic: إِلَىٰ رَبِّكَ يَوْمَئِذٍ ٱلْمُسْتَقَرُّ
english: To your Lord, that Day, is the [place of] permanence.

name: Al-Qiyamah
arabic: إِنَّ عَلَيْنَا جَمْعَهُۥ وَقُرْءَانَهُۥ
english: Indeed, upon Us is its collection [in your heart] and [to make possible] its recitation.

name: Al-Qiyamah
arabic: إِلَىٰ رَبِّهَا نَاظِرَةٌ
english: Looking at their Lord.

name: Al-Qiyamah
arabic: إِلَىٰ رَبِّكَ يَوْمَئِذٍ ٱلْمَسَاقُ
english: To your Lord, that Day, will be the procession.

name: Al-Qiyamah
arabic: فَلَا صَدَّقَ وَلَا صَلَّىٰ
english: And the disbeliever had not believed, nor had he prayed.

name: Al-Insan
arabic: إِنَّا هَدَيْنَـٰهُ ٱلسَّبِيلَ إِمَّا شَاكِرًا وَإِمَّا كَفُورًا
english: Indeed, We guided him to the way, be he grateful or be he ungrateful.

name: Al-Insan
arabic: إِنَّآ أَعْتَدْنَا لِلْكَـٰفِرِينَ سَلَـٰسِلَا۟ وَأَغْلَـٰلًا وَسَعِيرًا
english: Indeed, We have prepared for the disbelievers chains and shackles and a blaze.

name: Al-Insan
arabic: عَيْنًا يَشْرَبُ بِهَا عِبَادُ ٱللَّهِ يُفَجِّرُونَهَا تَفْجِيرًا
english: A spring of which the [righteous] servants of Allah will drink; they will make it gush forth in force [and abundance].

name: Al-Insan
arabic: يُوفُونَ بِٱلنَّذْرِ وَيَخَافُونَ يَوْمًا كَانَ شَرُّهُۥ مُسْتَطِيرًا
english: They [are those who] fulfill [their] vows and fear a Day whose evil will be widespread.

name: Al-Insan
arabic: إِنَّا نَخَافُ مِن رَّبِّنَا يَوْمًا عَبُوسًا قَمْطَرِيرًا
english: Indeed, We fear from our Lord a Day austere and distressful."

name: Al-Insan
arabic: فَوَقَىٰهُمُ ٱللَّهُ شَرَّ ذَٰلِكَ ٱلْيَوْمِ وَلَقَّىٰهُمْ نَضْرَةً وَسُرُورًا
english: So Allah will protect them from the evil of that Day and give them radiance and happiness

name: Al-Insan
arabic: عَيْنًا فِيهَا تُسَمَّىٰ سَلْسَبِيلًا
english: [From] a fountain within Paradise named Salsabeel.

name: Al-Insan
arabic: وَإِذَا رَأَيْتَ ثَمَّ رَأَيْتَ نَعِيمًا وَمُلْكًا كَبِيرًا
english: And when you look there [in Paradise], you will see pleasure and great dominion.

name: Al-Insan
arabic: عَـٰلِيَهُمْ ثِيَابُ سُندُسٍ خُضْرٌ وَإِسْتَبْرَقٌ ۖ وَحُلُّوٓا۟ أَسَاوِرَ مِن فِضَّةٍ وَسَقَىٰهُمْ رَبُّهُمْ شَرَابًا طَهُورًا
english: Upon the inhabitants will be green garments of fine silk and brocade. And they will be adorned with bracelets of silver, and their Lord will give them a purifying drink.

name: Al-Insan
arabic: فَٱصْبِرْ لِحُكْمِ رَبِّكَ وَلَا تُطِعْ مِنْهُمْ ءَاثِمًا أَوْ كَفُورًا
english: So be patient for the decision of your Lord and do not obey from among them a sinner or ungrateful [disbeliever].

name: Al-Insan
arabic: وَٱذْكُرِ ٱسْمَ رَبِّكَ بُكْرَةً وَأَصِيلًا
english: And mention the name of your Lord [in prayer] morning and evening

name: Al-Insan
arabic: إِنَّ هَـٰٓؤُلَآءِ يُحِبُّونَ ٱلْعَاجِلَةَ وَيَذَرُونَ وَرَآءَهُمْ يَوْمًا ثَقِيلًا
english: Indeed, these [disbelievers] love the immediate and leave behind them a grave Day.

name: Al-Insan
arabic: إِنَّ هَـٰذِهِۦ تَذْكِرَةٌ ۖ فَمَن شَآءَ ٱتَّخَذَ إِلَىٰ رَبِّهِۦ سَبِيلًا
english: Indeed, this is a reminder, so he who wills may take to his Lord a way.

name: Al-Insan
arabic: وَمَا تَشَآءُونَ إِلَّآ أَن يَشَآءَ ٱللَّهُ ۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ كَانَ عَلِيمًا حَكِيمًا
english: And you do not will except that Allah wills. Indeed, Allah is ever Knowing and Wise.

name: Al-Insan
arabic: يُدْخِلُ مَن يَشَآءُ فِى رَحْمَتِهِۦ ۚ وَٱلظَّـٰلِمِينَ أَعَدَّ لَهُمْ عَذَابًا أَلِيمًۢا
english: He admits whom He wills into His mercy; but the wrongdoers - He has prepared for them a painful punishment.

name: Al-Mursalat
arabic: وَمَآ أَدْرَىٰكَ مَا يَوْمُ ٱلْفَصْلِ
english: And what can make you know what is the Day of Judgement?

name: Al-Mursalat
arabic: كُلُوا۟ وَتَمَتَّعُوا۟ قَلِيلًا إِنَّكُم مُّجْرِمُونَ
english: [O disbelievers], eat and enjoy yourselves a little; indeed, you are criminals.

name: Al-Mursalat
arabic: وَإِذَا قِيلَ لَهُمُ ٱرْكَعُوا۟ لَا يَرْكَعُونَ
english: And when it is said to them, "Bow [in prayer]," they do not bow.

name: Al-Mursalat
arabic: فَبِأَىِّ حَدِيثٍۭ بَعْدَهُۥ يُؤْمِنُونَ
english: Then in what statement after the Qur\'an will they believe?

name: An-Naba
arabic: إِنَّ جَهَنَّمَ كَانَتْ مِرْصَادًا
english: Indeed, Hell has been lying in wait

name: An-Naba
arabic: رَّبِّ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَا ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ۖ لَا يَمْلِكُونَ مِنْهُ خِطَابًا
english: [From] the Lord of the heavens and the earth and whatever is between them, the Most Merciful. They possess not from Him [authority for] speech.

name: An-Naba
arabic: ذَٰلِكَ ٱلْيَوْمُ ٱلْحَقُّ ۖ فَمَن شَآءَ ٱتَّخَذَ إِلَىٰ رَبِّهِۦ مَـَٔابًا
english: That is the True Day; so he who wills may take to his Lord a [way of] return.

name: An-Nazi'at
arabic: قُلُوبٌ يَوْمَئِذٍ وَاجِفَةٌ
english: Hearts, that Day, will tremble,

name: An-Nazi'at
arabic: إِذْ نَادَىٰهُ رَبُّهُۥ بِٱلْوَادِ ٱلْمُقَدَّسِ طُوًى
english: When his Lord called to him in the sacred valley of Tuwa,

name: An-Nazi'at
arabic: وَأَهْدِيَكَ إِلَىٰ رَبِّكَ فَتَخْشَىٰ
english: And let me guide you to your Lord so you would fear [Him]?\'"

name: An-Nazi'at
arabic: فَقَالَ أَنَا۠ رَبُّكُمُ ٱلْأَعْلَىٰ
english: And said, "I am your most exalted lord."

name: An-Nazi'at
arabic: ءَأَنتُمْ أَشَدُّ خَلْقًا أَمِ ٱلسَّمَآءُ ۚ بَنَىٰهَا
english: Are you a more difficult creation or is the heaven? Allah constructed it.

name: An-Nazi'at
arabic: وَبُرِّزَتِ ٱلْجَحِيمُ لِمَن يَرَىٰ
english: And Hellfire will be exposed for [all] those who see -

name: An-Nazi'at
arabic: فَإِنَّ ٱلْجَحِيمَ هِىَ ٱلْمَأْوَىٰ
english: Then indeed, Hellfire will be [his] refuge.

name: An-Nazi'at
arabic: وَأَمَّا مَنْ خَافَ مَقَامَ رَبِّهِۦ وَنَهَى ٱلنَّفْسَ عَنِ ٱلْهَوَىٰ
english: But as for he who feared the position of his Lord and prevented the soul from [unlawful] inclination,

name: An-Nazi'at
arabic: فَإِنَّ ٱلْجَنَّةَ هِىَ ٱلْمَأْوَىٰ
english: Then indeed, Paradise will be [his] refuge.

name: An-Nazi'at
arabic: إِلَىٰ رَبِّكَ مُنتَهَىٰهَآ
english: To your Lord is its finality.

name: Abasa
arabic: أَوْ يَذَّكَّرُ فَتَنفَعَهُ ٱلذِّكْرَىٰٓ
english: Or be reminded and the remembrance would benefit him?

name: Abasa
arabic: وَهُوَ يَخْشَىٰ
english: While he fears [Allah],

name: Abasa
arabic: كَلَّآ إِنَّهَا تَذْكِرَةٌ
english: No! Indeed, these verses are a reminder;

name: Abasa
arabic: قُتِلَ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنُ مَآ أَكْفَرَهُۥ
english: Cursed is man; how disbelieving is he.

name: Abasa
arabic: أُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلْكَفَرَةُ ٱلْفَجَرَةُ
english: Those are the disbelievers, the wicked ones.

name: At-Takwir
arabic: وَإِذَا ٱلْجَحِيمُ سُعِّرَتْ
english: And when Hellfire is set ablaze

name: At-Takwir
arabic: وَإِذَا ٱلْجَنَّةُ أُزْلِفَتْ
english: And when Paradise is brought near,

name: At-Takwir
arabic: وَمَا هُوَ بِقَوْلِ شَيْطَـٰنٍ رَّجِيمٍ
english: And the Qur\'an is not the word of a devil, expelled [from the heavens].

name: At-Takwir
arabic: إِنْ هُوَ إِلَّا ذِكْرٌ لِّلْعَـٰلَمِينَ
english: It is not except a reminder to the worlds

name: At-Takwir
arabic: وَمَا تَشَآءُونَ إِلَّآ أَن يَشَآءَ ٱللَّهُ رَبُّ ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ
english: And you do not will except that Allah wills - Lord of the worlds.

name: Al-Infitar
arabic: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلْإِنسَـٰنُ مَا غَرَّكَ بِرَبِّكَ ٱلْكَرِيمِ
english: O mankind, what has deceived you concerning your Lord, the Generous,

name: Al-Infitar
arabic: وَإِنَّ ٱلْفُجَّارَ لَفِى جَحِيمٍ
english: And indeed, the wicked will be in Hellfire.

name: Al-Infitar
arabic: يَوْمَ لَا تَمْلِكُ نَفْسٌ لِّنَفْسٍ شَيْـًٔا ۖ وَٱلْأَمْرُ يَوْمَئِذٍ لِّلَّهِ
english: It is the Day when a soul will not possess for another soul [power to do] a thing; and the command, that Day, is [entirely] with Allah.

name: Al-Mutaffifin
arabic: يَوْمَ يَقُومُ ٱلنَّاسُ لِرَبِّ ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ
english: The Day when mankind will stand before the Lord of the worlds?

name: Al-Mutaffifin
arabic: كَلَّا ۖ بَلْ ۜ رَانَ عَلَىٰ قُلُوبِهِم مَّا كَانُوا۟ يَكْسِبُونَ
english: No! Rather, the stain has covered their hearts of that which they were earning.

name: Al-Mutaffifin
arabic: كَلَّآ إِنَّهُمْ عَن رَّبِّهِمْ يَوْمَئِذٍ لَّمَحْجُوبُونَ
english: No! Indeed, from their Lord, that Day, they will be partitioned.

name: Al-Mutaffifin
arabic: ثُمَّ إِنَّهُمْ لَصَالُوا۟ ٱلْجَحِيمِ
english: Then indeed, they will [enter and] burn in Hellfire.

name: Al-Mutaffifin
arabic: عَيْنًا يَشْرَبُ بِهَا ٱلْمُقَرَّبُونَ
english: A spring from which those near [to Allah] drink.

name: Al-Mutaffifin
arabic: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ أَجْرَمُوا۟ كَانُوا۟ مِنَ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ يَضْحَكُونَ
english: Indeed, those who committed crimes used to laugh at those who believed.

name: Al-Mutaffifin
arabic: فَٱلْيَوْمَ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ مِنَ ٱلْكُفَّارِ يَضْحَكُونَ
english: So Today those who believed are laughing at the disbelievers,

name: Al-Inshiqaq
arabic: وَأَذِنَتْ لِرَبِّهَا وَحُقَّتْ
english: And has responded to its Lord and was obligated [to do so]

name: Al-Inshiqaq
arabic: وَأَذِنَتْ لِرَبِّهَا وَحُقَّتْ
english: And has responded to its Lord and was obligated [to do so] -

name: Al-Inshiqaq
arabic: إِنَّهُۥ ظَنَّ أَن لَّن يَحُورَ
english: Indeed, he had thought he would never return [to Allah].

name: Al-Inshiqaq
arabic: بَلَىٰٓ إِنَّ رَبَّهُۥ كَانَ بِهِۦ بَصِيرًا
english: But yes! Indeed, his Lord was ever of him, Seeing.

name: Al-Inshiqaq
arabic: فَمَا لَهُمْ لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ
english: So what is [the matter] with them [that] they do not believe,

name: Al-Inshiqaq
arabic: وَإِذَا قُرِئَ عَلَيْهِمُ ٱلْقُرْءَانُ لَا يَسْجُدُونَ ۩
english: And when the Qur\'an is recited to them, they do not prostrate [to Allah]?

name: Al-Inshiqaq
arabic: بَلِ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ يُكَذِّبُونَ
english: But those who have disbelieved deny,

name: Al-Inshiqaq
arabic: وَٱللَّهُ أَعْلَمُ بِمَا يُوعُونَ
english: And Allah is most knowing of what they keep within themselves.

name: Al-Buruj
arabic: ٱلنَّارِ ذَاتِ ٱلْوَقُودِ
english: [Containing] the fire full of fuel,

name: Al-Buruj
arabic: وَمَا نَقَمُوا۟ مِنْهُمْ إِلَّآ أَن يُؤْمِنُوا۟ بِٱللَّهِ ٱلْعَزِيزِ ٱلْحَمِيدِ
english: And they resented them not except because they believed in Allah, the Exalted in Might, the Praiseworthy,

name: Al-Buruj
arabic: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّـٰلِحَـٰتِ لَهُمْ جَنَّـٰتٌ تَجْرِى مِن تَحْتِهَا ٱلْأَنْهَـٰرُ ۚ ذَٰلِكَ ٱلْفَوْزُ ٱلْكَبِيرُ
english: Indeed, those who have believed and done righteous deeds will have gardens beneath which rivers flow. That is the great attainment.

name: Al-Buruj
arabic: إِنَّ بَطْشَ رَبِّكَ لَشَدِيدٌ
english: Indeed, the vengeance of your Lord is severe.

name: Al-Buruj
arabic: بَلِ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ فِى تَكْذِيبٍ
english: But they who disbelieve are in [persistent] denial,

name: Al-Buruj
arabic: وَٱللَّهُ مِن وَرَآئِهِم مُّحِيطٌۢ
english: While Allah encompasses them from behind.

name: At-Tariq
arabic: إِنَّهُۥ عَلَىٰ رَجْعِهِۦ لَقَادِرٌ
english: Indeed, Allah, to return him [to life], is Able.

name: At-Tariq
arabic: فَمَهِّلِ ٱلْكَـٰفِرِينَ أَمْهِلْهُمْ رُوَيْدًۢا
english: So allow time for the disbelievers. Leave them awhile.

name: Al-A'la
arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ سَبِّحِ ٱسْمَ رَبِّكَ ٱلْأَعْلَى
english: Exalt the name of your Lord, the Most High,

name: Al-A'la
arabic: وَٱلَّذِى قَدَّرَ فَهَدَىٰ
english: And who destined and [then] guided

name: Al-A'la
arabic: إِلَّا مَا شَآءَ ٱللَّهُ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ يَعْلَمُ ٱلْجَهْرَ وَمَا يَخْفَىٰ
english: Except what Allah should will. Indeed, He knows what is declared and what is hidden.

name: Al-A'la
arabic: فَذَكِّرْ إِن نَّفَعَتِ ٱلذِّكْرَىٰ
english: So remind, if the reminder should benefit;

name: Al-A'la
arabic: سَيَذَّكَّرُ مَن يَخْشَىٰ
english: He who fears [Allah] will be reminded.

name: Al-A'la
arabic: ٱلَّذِى يَصْلَى ٱلنَّارَ ٱلْكُبْرَىٰ
english: [He] who will [enter and] burn in the greatest Fire,

name: Al-A'la
arabic: وَذَكَرَ ٱسْمَ رَبِّهِۦ فَصَلَّىٰ
english: And mentions the name of his Lord and prays.

name: Al-Ghashiyah
arabic: تَصْلَىٰ نَارًا حَامِيَةً
english: They will [enter to] burn in an intensely hot Fire.

name: Al-Ghashiyah
arabic: فَذَكِّرْ إِنَّمَآ أَنتَ مُذَكِّرٌ
english: So remind, [O Muhammad]; you are only a reminder.

name: Al-Ghashiyah
arabic: إِلَّا مَن تَوَلَّىٰ وَكَفَرَ
english: However, he who turns away and disbelieves -

name: Al-Ghashiyah
arabic: فَيُعَذِّبُهُ ٱللَّهُ ٱلْعَذَابَ ٱلْأَكْبَرَ
english: Then Allah will punish him with the greatest punishment.

name: Al-Fajr
arabic: أَلَمْ تَرَ كَيْفَ فَعَلَ رَبُّكَ بِعَادٍ
english: Have you not considered how your Lord dealt with \'Aad -

name: Al-Fajr
arabic: فَصَبَّ عَلَيْهِمْ رَبُّكَ سَوْطَ عَذَابٍ
english: So your Lord poured upon them a scourge of punishment.

name: Al-Fajr
arabic: إِنَّ رَبَّكَ لَبِٱلْمِرْصَادِ
english: Indeed, your Lord is in observation.

name: Al-Fajr
arabic: فَأَمَّا ٱلْإِنسَـٰنُ إِذَا مَا ٱبْتَلَىٰهُ رَبُّهُۥ فَأَكْرَمَهُۥ وَنَعَّمَهُۥ فَيَقُولُ رَبِّىٓ أَكْرَمَنِ
english: And as for man, when his Lord tries him and [thus] is generous to him and favors him, he says, "My Lord has honored me."

name: Al-Fajr
arabic: وَأَمَّآ إِذَا مَا ٱبْتَلَىٰهُ فَقَدَرَ عَلَيْهِ رِزْقَهُۥ فَيَقُولُ رَبِّىٓ أَهَـٰنَنِ
english: But when He tries him and restricts his provision, he says, "My Lord has humiliated me."

name: Al-Fajr
arabic: وَلَا تَحَـٰٓضُّونَ عَلَىٰ طَعَامِ ٱلْمِسْكِينِ
english: And you do not encourage one another to feed the poor.

name: Al-Fajr
arabic: وَجَآءَ رَبُّكَ وَٱلْمَلَكُ صَفًّا صَفًّا
english: And your Lord has come and the angels, rank upon rank,

name: Al-Fajr
arabic: وَجِا۟ىٓءَ يَوْمَئِذٍۭ بِجَهَنَّمَ ۚ يَوْمَئِذٍ يَتَذَكَّرُ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنُ وَأَنَّىٰ لَهُ ٱلذِّكْرَىٰ
english: And brought [within view], that Day, is Hell - that Day, man will remember, but what good to him will be the remembrance?

name: Al-Fajr
arabic: وَلَا يُوثِقُ وَثَاقَهُۥٓ أَحَدٌ
english: And none will bind [as severely] as His binding [of the evildoers].

name: Al-Fajr
arabic: ٱرْجِعِىٓ إِلَىٰ رَبِّكِ رَاضِيَةً مَّرْضِيَّةً
english: Return to your Lord, well-pleased and pleasing [to Him],

name: Al-Fajr
arabic: وَٱدْخُلِى جَنَّتِى
english: And enter My Paradise."

name: Al-Balad
arabic: ثُمَّ كَانَ مِنَ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَتَوَاصَوْا۟ بِٱلصَّبْرِ وَتَوَاصَوْا۟ بِٱلْمَرْحَمَةِ
english: And then being among those who believed and advised one another to patience and advised one another to compassion.

name: Al-Balad
arabic: وَٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ بِـَٔايَـٰتِنَا هُمْ أَصْحَـٰبُ ٱلْمَشْـَٔمَةِ
english: But they who disbelieved in Our signs - those are the companions of the left.

name: Al-Balad
arabic: عَلَيْهِمْ نَارٌ مُّؤْصَدَةٌۢ
english: Over them will be fire closed in.

name: Ash-Shams
arabic: فَكَذَّبُوهُ فَعَقَرُوهَا فَدَمْدَمَ عَلَيْهِمْ رَبُّهُم بِذَنۢبِهِمْ فَسَوَّىٰهَا
english: But they denied him and hamstrung her. So their Lord brought down upon them destruction for their sin and made it equal [upon all of them].

name: Al-Layl
arabic: فَأَمَّا مَنْ أَعْطَىٰ وَٱتَّقَىٰ
english: As for he who gives and fears Allah

name: Al-Layl
arabic: إِنَّ عَلَيْنَا لَلْهُدَىٰ
english: Indeed, [incumbent] upon Us is guidance.

name: Al-Layl
arabic: إِلَّا ٱبْتِغَآءَ وَجْهِ رَبِّهِ ٱلْأَعْلَىٰ
english: But only seeking the countenance of his Lord, Most High.

name: Ad-Duhaa
arabic: مَا وَدَّعَكَ رَبُّكَ وَمَا قَلَىٰ
english: Your Lord has not taken leave of you, [O Muhammad], nor has He detested [you].

name: Ad-Duhaa
arabic: وَلَسَوْفَ يُعْطِيكَ رَبُّكَ فَتَرْضَىٰٓ
english: And your Lord is going to give you, and you will be satisfied.

name: Ad-Duhaa
arabic: وَوَجَدَكَ ضَآلًّا فَهَدَىٰ
english: And He found you lost and guided [you],

name: Ad-Duhaa
arabic: وَوَجَدَكَ عَآئِلًا فَأَغْنَىٰ
english: And He found you poor and made [you] self-sufficient.

name: Ad-Duhaa
arabic: وَأَمَّا بِنِعْمَةِ رَبِّكَ فَحَدِّثْ
english: But as for the favor of your Lord, report [it].

name: Ash-Sharh
arabic: وَإِلَىٰ رَبِّكَ فَٱرْغَب
english: And to your Lord direct [your] longing.

name: At-Tin
arabic: أَلَيْسَ ٱللَّهُ بِأَحْكَمِ ٱلْحَـٰكِمِينَ
english: Is not Allah the most just of judges?

name: Al-Alaq
arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ ٱقْرَأْ بِٱسْمِ رَبِّكَ ٱلَّذِى خَلَقَ
english: Recite in the name of your Lord who created -

name: Al-Alaq
arabic: ٱقْرَأْ وَرَبُّكَ ٱلْأَكْرَمُ
english: Recite, and your Lord is the most Generous -

name: Al-Alaq
arabic: إِنَّ إِلَىٰ رَبِّكَ ٱلرُّجْعَىٰٓ
english: Indeed, to your Lord is the return.

name: Al-Alaq
arabic: أَرَءَيْتَ إِن كَانَ عَلَى ٱلْهُدَىٰٓ
english: Have you seen if he is upon guidance

name: Al-Alaq
arabic: أَلَمْ يَعْلَم بِأَنَّ ٱللَّهَ يَرَىٰ
english: Does he not know that Allah sees?

name: Al-Alaq
arabic: سَنَدْعُ ٱلزَّبَانِيَةَ
english: We will call the angels of Hell.

name: Al-Alaq
arabic: كَلَّا لَا تُطِعْهُ وَٱسْجُدْ وَٱقْتَرِب ۩
english: No! Do not obey him. But prostrate and draw near [to Allah].

name: Al-Qadr
arabic: تَنَزَّلُ ٱلْمَلَـٰٓئِكَةُ وَٱلرُّوحُ فِيهَا بِإِذْنِ رَبِّهِم مِّن كُلِّ أَمْرٍ
english: The angels and the Spirit descend therein by permission of their Lord for every matter.

name: Al-Bayyinah
arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ لَمْ يَكُنِ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ مِنْ أَهْلِ ٱلْكِتَـٰبِ وَٱلْمُشْرِكِينَ مُنفَكِّينَ حَتَّىٰ تَأْتِيَهُمُ ٱلْبَيِّنَةُ
english: Those who disbelieved among the People of the Scripture and the polytheists were not to be parted [from misbelief] until there came to them clear evidence -

name: Al-Bayyinah
arabic: رَسُولٌ مِّنَ ٱللَّهِ يَتْلُوا۟ صُحُفًا مُّطَهَّرَةً
english: A Messenger from Allah, reciting purified scriptures

name: Al-Bayyinah
arabic: وَمَآ أُمِرُوٓا۟ إِلَّا لِيَعْبُدُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ مُخْلِصِينَ لَهُ ٱلدِّينَ حُنَفَآءَ وَيُقِيمُوا۟ ٱلصَّلَوٰةَ وَيُؤْتُوا۟ ٱلزَّكَوٰةَ ۚ وَذَٰلِكَ دِينُ ٱلْقَيِّمَةِ
english: And they were not commanded except to worship Allah, [being] sincere to Him in religion, inclining to truth, and to establish prayer and to give zakah. And that is the correct religion.

name: Al-Bayyinah
arabic: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ مِنْ أَهْلِ ٱلْكِتَـٰبِ وَٱلْمُشْرِكِينَ فِى نَارِ جَهَنَّمَ خَـٰلِدِينَ فِيهَآ ۚ أُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ هُمْ شَرُّ ٱلْبَرِيَّةِ
english: Indeed, they who disbelieved among the People of the Scripture and the polytheists will be in the fire of Hell, abiding eternally therein. Those are the worst of creatures.

name: Al-Bayyinah
arabic: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّـٰلِحَـٰتِ أُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ هُمْ خَيْرُ ٱلْبَرِيَّةِ
english: Indeed, they who have believed and done righteous deeds - those are the best of creatures.

name: Az-Zalzalah
arabic: بِأَنَّ رَبَّكَ أَوْحَىٰ لَهَا
english: Because your Lord has commanded it.

name: Az-Zalzalah
arabic: وَمَن يَعْمَلْ مِثْقَالَ ذَرَّةٍ شَرًّا يَرَهُۥ
english: And whoever does an atom\'s weight of evil will see it.

name: Al-Adiyat
arabic: إِنَّ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنَ لِرَبِّهِۦ لَكَنُودٌ
english: Indeed mankind, to his Lord, is ungrateful.

name: Al-Adiyat
arabic: إِنَّ رَبَّهُم بِهِمْ يَوْمَئِذٍ لَّخَبِيرٌۢ
english: Indeed, their Lord with them, that Day, is [fully] Acquainted.

name: Al-Qari'ah
arabic: فَأَمَّا مَن ثَقُلَتْ مَوَٰزِينُهُۥ
english: Then as for one whose scales are heavy [with good deeds],

name: Al-Qari'ah
arabic: نَارٌ حَامِيَةٌۢ
english: It is a Fire, intensely hot.

name: At-Takathur
arabic: لَتَرَوُنَّ ٱلْجَحِيمَ
english: You will surely see the Hellfire.

name: Al-Asr
arabic: إِلَّا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّـٰلِحَـٰتِ وَتَوَاصَوْا۟ بِٱلْحَقِّ وَتَوَاصَوْا۟ بِٱلصَّبْرِ
english: Except for those who have believed and done righteous deeds and advised each other to truth and advised each other to patience.

name: Al-Humazah
arabic: نَارُ ٱللَّهِ ٱلْمُوقَدَةُ
english: It is the fire of Allah, [eternally] fueled,

name: Al-Humazah
arabic: ٱلَّتِى تَطَّلِعُ عَلَى ٱلْأَفْـِٔدَةِ
english: Which mounts directed at the hearts.

name: Al-Humazah
arabic: إِنَّهَا عَلَيْهِم مُّؤْصَدَةٌ
english: Indeed, Hellfire will be closed down upon them

name: Al-Fil
arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ أَلَمْ تَرَ كَيْفَ فَعَلَ رَبُّكَ بِأَصْحَـٰبِ ٱلْفِيلِ
english: Have you not considered, [O Muhammad], how your Lord dealt with the companions of the elephant?

name: Al-Fil
arabic: أَلَمْ يَجْعَلْ كَيْدَهُمْ فِى تَضْلِيلٍ
english: Did He not make their plan into misguidance?

name: Quraysh
arabic: فَلْيَعْبُدُوا۟ رَبَّ هَـٰذَا ٱلْبَيْتِ
english: Let them worship the Lord of this House,

name: Al-Ma'un
arabic: وَلَا يَحُضُّ عَلَىٰ طَعَامِ ٱلْمِسْكِينِ
english: And does not encourage the feeding of the poor.

name: Al-Ma'un
arabic: ٱلَّذِينَ هُمْ عَن صَلَاتِهِمْ سَاهُونَ
english: [But] who are heedless of their prayer -

name: Al-Kawthar
arabic: فَصَلِّ لِرَبِّكَ وَٱنْحَرْ
english: So pray to your Lord and sacrifice [to Him alone].

name: Al-Kafirun
arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ قُلْ يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلْكَـٰفِرُونَ
english: Say, "O disbelievers,

name: An-Nasr
arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ إِذَا جَآءَ نَصْرُ ٱللَّهِ وَٱلْفَتْحُ
english: When the victory of Allah has come and the conquest,

name: An-Nasr
arabic: وَرَأَيْتَ ٱلنَّاسَ يَدْخُلُونَ فِى دِينِ ٱللَّهِ أَفْوَاجًا
english: And you see the people entering into the religion of Allah in multitudes,

name: An-Nasr
arabic: فَسَبِّحْ بِحَمْدِ رَبِّكَ وَٱسْتَغْفِرْهُ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ تَوَّابًۢا
english: Then exalt [Him] with praise of your Lord and ask forgiveness of Him. Indeed, He is ever Accepting of repentance.

name: Al-Masad
arabic: سَيَصْلَىٰ نَارًا ذَاتَ لَهَبٍ
english: He will [enter to] burn in a Fire of [blazing] flame

name: Al-Masad
arabic: وَٱمْرَأَتُهُۥ حَمَّالَةَ ٱلْحَطَبِ
english: And his wife [as well] - the carrier of firewood.

name: Al-Ikhlas
arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ قُلْ هُوَ ٱللَّهُ أَحَدٌ
english: Say, "He is Allah, [who is] One,

name: Al-Ikhlas
arabic: ٱللَّهُ ٱلصَّمَدُ
english: Allah, the Eternal Refuge.

name: Al-Falaq
arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ قُلْ أَعُوذُ بِرَبِّ ٱلْفَلَقِ
english: Say, "I seek refuge in the Lord of daybreak

name: Al-Falaq
arabic: مِن شَرِّ مَا خَلَقَ
english: From the evil of that which He created

name: Al-Falaq
arabic: وَمِن شَرِّ غَاسِقٍ إِذَا وَقَبَ
english: And from the evil of darkness when it settles

name: Al-Falaq
arabic: وَمِن شَرِّ ٱلنَّفَّـٰثَـٰتِ فِى ٱلْعُقَدِ
english: And from the evil of the blowers in knots

name: Al-Falaq
arabic: وَمِن شَرِّ حَاسِدٍ إِذَا حَسَدَ
english: And from the evil of an envier when he envies."

name: An-Nas
arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ قُلْ أَعُوذُ بِرَبِّ ٱلنَّاسِ
english: Say, "I seek refuge in the Lord of mankind,

name: An-Nas
arabic: مِن شَرِّ ٱلْوَسْوَاسِ ٱلْخَنَّاسِ
english: From the evil of the retreating whisperer -

name: An-Nas
arabic: ٱلَّذِى يُوَسْوِسُ فِى صُدُورِ ٱلنَّاسِ
english: Who whispers [evil] into the breasts of mankind -
